title: ARTME Clay Tools, 14pcs Pottery Tool Set Polymer Clay Ceramic Sculpting Kit with Carrying Case, DIY Art Crafts
features: COMPLETE SET: 14-piece professional pottery and clay sculpting tools including metal trimming tools, wooden modelling tools, and steel wire tools in a portable case
VERSATILE TOOLS: Collection includes various shaped wooden tools, metal loop tools, wire tools, and ribbon tools for diverse sculpting techniques
ORGANISED STORAGE: Durable black zip-around case with elastic holders keeps tools secure and properly arranged for easy access and transport
DUAL MATERIALS: Features both wooden-handled metal tools for precise cutting and shaping, and smooth wooden tools for gentle clay manipulation
PROFESSIONAL QUALITY: Sturdy construction of tools suitable for both beginners and experienced potters, perfect for detailed clay, polymer clay work and ceramics
description: Product Description Artme is a UK based supplier of art & graphic materials including artist brushes, canvas, easels to both amateur, professional and commercial users throughout the U.K and Europe. With a passion of arts and craft, we offer a wide range of punches, scissors and knitting products for hobby craft lovers. Comprehensive & Versatile Toolset All-in-One Pottery Sculpting Kit Includes 14 essential tools for carving, shaping, and detailing. Suitable for pottery, clay modeling, and various sculpting techniques. Perfect for creating both intricate details and smooth surfaces. Portable & Well-Organized Convenient Carrying Case for Easy Storage Comes with a compact case to keep tools neatly arranged. Lightweight and easy to transport for on-the-go creativity. Ensures quick access to the right tool at any time. Durable & Ergonomic Design Comfortable and Long-Lasting Use Made from high-quality wood and stainless steel for durability. Ergonomic grip ensures comfortable handling during long projects. Designed for precision without hand fatigue. Precision & Control for Fine Detailing Achieve Professional-Level Results Features loop tools, needle tools, and stylus tools for accuracy. Helps refine edges, create textures, and add intricate patterns. Ideal for both delicate designs and bold sculpting work. Suitable for All Skill Levels Perfect for Beginners & Professionals Easy to use for hobbyists and aspiring artists. Provides advanced detailing tools for experienced sculptors. A great addition to any ceramic artist’s toolkit. ARTME Air Dry Clay White 500g Modelling Clay Air Hardening for Arts and Creat...
